debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
f : U → ℕ
h : empty A
⊢ image f A = I 0

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext; intro y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    cases h1 with
    | intro x h2 =>
      cases h2 with
      | intro hxA _ =>
        have : ∃ z, z ∈ A := ⟨x, hxA⟩
        contradiction
  · intro h1
    cases h1
failed_attempts:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h1
    cases h1 with x hx
    have : ∃ x, x ∈ A := ⟨x, hx.1⟩
    contradiction
  · intro h1
    cases h1

by
  apply Set_ext; intro y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact absurd hx (h x)
  · intro hy
    cases hy

by
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨y, hy, _⟩
    exact h y hy
  · intro hx
    exact Nat.not_lt_zero x hx

by
  apply Set.ext; intro y
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro ⟨x, hx, _⟩
    exact absurd hx (h x)
  · intro hy
    exact absurd hy (Nat.not_lt_zero y)

by
  apply Set_ext

  · intro hy

by

    exact h x hx
  · intro H
